title: format configuration
description: Configuration file for the format CLI.

$schema.description: JSON schema URI used by editors and tooling.

exclude.description: Global glob patterns that are ignored before formatter-specific matching.

workingDirectory.description: Default process working directory for formatter commands. Relative paths are resolved from the caller's current working directory.

patterns.description: Glob patterns matched against candidate file paths.

workingDirectory.description: Formatter-specific process working directory. Overrides the top-level workingDirectory.

filesDelimiter.description: Delimiter used to join file paths when expanding $FILES. Defaults to a single space.

command.description: Executable and arguments used to invoke the formatter. Include $FILES where the assigned files should be expanded. Use $WORKING_DIRECTORY to pass the resolved process working directory. Use $GLOB_FIRST_BASENAME(<glob>) to pass the basename of the first sorted glob match relative to the formatter working directory.
